weeklyCadence.label: Weekly Pack Refresh
weeklyCadence.rule: Every pack must be rebuilt weekly from latest-public-drops, live-intel, intel-vault, source files, book routes, and filtered forum exports. Active news links must stay source-labelled and expired links must move to the vault.

title: Trust And Evidence Pack
label: Credibility pack
summary: A briefing pack for claim labels, source hierarchy, corrections, privacy, association boundaries, machine-readable taxonomy, and public-interest anti-corruption discipline.
weeklyMission: Keep the whole site credible: claim strength, source hierarchy, corrections, association boundary, private-victim protection, and machine-readable evidence taxonomy.
brandLine: The evidence boundary is not weakness. It is what makes the archive stronger than noise.
boundary: A dossier pack is an orientation bundle. It does not prove guilt, causation, intent, control, or criminal conduct.
contentAngles: How to read the site safely

takeaways: Machine-readable taxonomy should reflect evidence boundaries.
A pack is useful only if the reader can see the source route and claim boundary.
